message:
feat(tui): add ActionMenu overlay with contextual per-item actions

- Add tui_action_menu.rs with ActionMenu overlay rendering at z=4.3
- Wire `.` key in tui_app.rs to open action menu for current screen
- Add contextual_actions() trait method to MailScreen (mod.rs)
- Implement contextual_actions() for:
  - ReservationsScreen (release, renew, force-release actions)
  - ContactsScreen (approve, deny, revoke, link-to-message actions)
  - MessageBrowserScreen (reply, view-thread, jump-to-timeline actions)
- Add DeepLinkTarget::target_screen() helper for navigation
- Fix show_project field handling in message query functions

Completes br-2bbt.5.2 (ActionMenu overlay) and br-2bbt.5.3 (modal wiring)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
